# Kimi K3 Best

Source-first Kimi K3 research map generated from https://github.com/clauxel/kimik3.

Collected source ledger timestamp: 2026-07-23T00:30:00+08:00

## Pages
- Kimi K3 Best Source Map: https://kimik3.best/ - A practical Kimi K3 research map from the clauxel/kimik3 ledger, with official sources, API notes, architecture papers, reviews and follow-ups.
- Kimi K3 Official Sources: https://kimik3.best/official-sources/ - Official Kimi K3 source map covering the Kimi launch page, Moonshot company page, Kimi help center, model-mode guide and Kimi Websites overview.
- Kimi K3 API and Developer Notes: https://kimik3.best/api-and-developer/ - Practical Kimi K3 API notes: OpenAI-compatible shape, base URL, model examples, reasoning effort, 1M context, pricing and Kimi Code endpoints.
- Kimi K3 Architecture Trail: https://kimik3.best/architecture/ - A Kimi K3 architecture trail through Kimi Linear, Kimi Delta Attention, Attention Residuals, FlashKDA and official implementation repositories.
- Kimi K3 Reviews and Media Signals: https://kimik3.best/reviews-and-media/ - External Kimi K3 reviews and media signals from Nature, AP, Tom's Hardware, engineering tests, community discussions, video queues and measurement disclosures.
- Kimi K3 Practical Companion Pages: https://kimik3.best/companion-pages/ - A practical Kimi K3 companion map for context window, API cost, pricing, local deployment, hardware requirements, benchmarks, alternatives and use-case pages.
- Kimi K3 Follow-Up Watchlist: https://kimik3.best/follow-up-watchlist/ - Kimi K3 follow-up watchlist for the official technical report, full weights, MoonshotAI GitHub repo, Hugging Face model page, Bilibili and YouTube refreshes.

## Current source boundaries
- Official technical report: pending official release
- Full weights: scheduled by official materials for 2026-07-27; pending verification
- Official MoonshotAI GitHub Kimi-K3 repo: not found in current scan
- Official moonshotai Hugging Face Kimi-K3 repo: not found in current scan
